programmes.show_description: An uplifting round-up of good news stories from the UK and around the world.
Christmas romance with Amber Stevens West. Every Christmas, a mysterious philanthropist claims his charity's gifts come straight from Santa himself. Can a cynical reporter unwrap the truth? (2020)
An uplifting round-up of good news stories from the UK and around the world.
The People Next Door: The people of Mission Estates don't know that one of their own, a doctor, is hiding a secret. Now Jonathan and Mark must help him confront his past.

Scottish rom-com with Kelly Macdonald and David Tennant. After Hollywood star Lara Tyler finds out her secret wedding will be ruined by paparazzi, she hires local girl Katie as her decoy bride. (2011)
